root_cause_addressed.description: TelemetrySeverity enum values DEBUG/INFO/WARNING/ERROR/CRITICAL collide with system preprocessor macros injected via -DDEBUG=1 and similar compiler flags

compliance_pattern_applied.pattern: Enum values renamed to kEnumValue pattern: kDebug, kInfo, kWarning, kError, kCritical

constraints: Minimal blast radius: only 2 files modified

files_modified.changes_summary: Renamed TelemetrySeverity enum values from DEBUG/INFO/WARNING/ERROR/CRITICAL to kDebug/kInfo/kWarning/kError/kCritical
Updated switch-case labels in log_event() to use new kEnumValue names

warnings: pre-existing sign-conversion warnings in timing.hpp and wcet_measurement.cpp — unrelated to this fix

fix_validation.evidence: Build exits 0. No errors mentioning TelemetrySeverity, DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, or CRITICAL in build output.

rollback_instructions.description: Revert enum values in telemetry_types.hpp lines 20-24 from kDebug/kInfo/kWarning/kError/kCritical back to DEBUG/INFO/WARNING/ERROR/CRITICAL, and revert switch-case labels in telemetry_writer.cpp lines 189-193 to match.
